inputs.custom_prompt: write a video scenes descibe what is the action in this video, what is the mood, and what is the character emotion. write within 100 words.

inputs.text: A woman in a long flowing dress stands ankle-deep in the ocean at dawn. The horizon glows pale gold, waves whisper against the sand. A broken conch shell lies at her feet, humming faintly with an otherworldly sound. Wide cinematic shot, natural morning light, lens flare, mist in the air, poetic melancholy.

inputs.prompt: Next Scene: She kneels, pressing the conch to her ear. The whisper turns into a melody — echoes of a voice calling her name from deep underwater. Medium close-up, warm light blending with cool ocean tones, shallow DOF, intimate handheld framing.

Next Scene: The tide rises unnaturally fast, circling her in a spiral of glowing plankton. The sea begins to pulse like a living heartbeat. Low-angle shot, teal bioluminescence, HDR detail, surreal movement in the water, cinematic magic realism.

Next Scene: She dives beneath the surface, surrounded by flickering schools of silver fish and shimmering ribbons of light. A faint silhouette appears in the distance — human but translucent. Underwater tracking shot, diffused caustics, volumetric rays, graceful slow motion, emotional gravity.

Next Scene: She reaches out — the figure touches her hand. Memories flood through her mind: a storm, a lost ship, a farewell. Their forms begin to merge into glowing water. Close-up macro detail, surreal morphing, glowing particles drifting upward, ethereal beauty

Next Scene: The sea calms. Only the conch remains on the empty shore, softly glowing with her reflection inside. The tide retreats, leaving a single footprint. Wide pullback shot, soft golden haze, reflective wet sand, emotional stillness, cinematic closure.
